name: Pennsylvania Auto Credit
description_short: Pennsylvania Auto Credit specializes in Buy Here Pay Here and second-chance auto financing for borrowers with bad credit, bankruptcy, or repossession history in the Philadelphia/Bucks County area.
description_long:
Pennsylvania Auto Credit is a used car financing company headquartered in Fairless Hills, PA, serving the Philadelphia, Bucks County, and Trenton regions. The company focuses on providing auto loans to consumers who have been denied by traditional lenders due to poor credit histories, bankruptcies, tax liens, judgments, or recent repossessions. They operate through a network of affiliated Peruzzi dealerships (Buick, GMC, Mazda, Mitsubishi, Nissan, Toyota locations) across Pennsylvania.

PA Auto Credit offers Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) financing, fresh start financing after repossession, discharged bankruptcy auto loans, and credit programs for consumers with tax liens and past-due accounts. They advertise an online application process completed in minutes and maintain flexible financing options designed around borrower budgets. The company operates Monday-Friday 9am-8pm and Saturday 9am-5pm from their single physical location.

The company differentiates itself by explicitly positioning as a second-chance lender that accepts applicants rejected by traditional financing sources. They emphasize serving first-time buyers and credit-rebuilding customers, offering bilingual services (Se Habla Español), and partnering with established Peruzzi dealerships rather than operating as an independent buy-here-pay-here lot. Their marketing emphasizes removing barriers for consumers with financial hardship histories.

PA Auto Credit operates in a niche lending segment (BHPH/subprime auto) with higher risk profiles. While no APR rates, loan terms, or payment structures are disclosed on their website, BHPH dealers typically charge significantly higher interest rates and require frequent payments. The company provides no third-party reviews, complaint information, or transparency about loan costs on their accessible web content, which is standard industry opacity in this lending category.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Explicitly accepts applicants with bankruptcies, repossessions, tax liens, and judgment histories
Online application available for convenience, completed in minutes
Partnerships with established Peruzzi dealership network across multiple vehicle brands
Extended business hours including Saturday availability (9am-5pm)
Buy Here Pay Here model allows financing and vehicle sales through one source
Serves three major geographic markets (Philadelphia, Bucks County, Trenton)
cons: No APR, interest rates, loan terms, or payment frequency disclosed on website—opacity typical of BHPH lenders
Buy Here Pay Here model typically requires in-person payments and GPS tracking, not disclosed but standard practice
Single physical location despite serving three-county area limits accessibility
No customer reviews, ratings, or complaint history visible on company website
Limited transparency about vehicle inventory, pricing, or loan approval criteria
best_for: Consumers with recent repossessions seeking immediate vehicle replacement
Borrowers with bankruptcy or judgment history unable to qualify for traditional auto financing
First-time car buyers with no credit history or severely damaged credit scores
Philadelphia/Bucks County residents needing bilingual lending services
diagnosis: PA Auto Credit is best for borrowers with damaged credit, recent repossessions, or bankruptcy who have exhausted traditional auto financing options and need immediate transportation in the Fairless Hills/Philadelphia area. The primary caveat is that BHPH lending typically carries high costs (rates often 18-29% APR or higher) and frequent payment requirements not disclosed on their website—applicants should verify loan terms carefully before commitment.
services: Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) auto financing
Fresh Start Financing after vehicle repossession
Credit programs for tax liens and past-due accounts
Used vehicle sales through affiliated Peruzzi dealerships
Vehicle financing for drivers with no credit history
Second-chance auto loans after credit rejections
Co-applicant and guarantor options (implied through application language)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 164 Lincoln Hwy Suite 103, Fairless Hills, PA 19030
